root.speaker: Corin Mosscup
root.text: Welcome in. I'm Corin. This hearth's mine to keep, and it's yours while you're in Aetherhaven. After everything the old world went through, a warm bowl still fixes a lot.

choices.text: Tell me about the guest pool.
About a place for you to live...

inn_explain_pool.speaker: Corin Mosscup
inn_explain_pool.text: Wanderers still find us when the roads allow. The inn keeps two guest spots at a time, room for traders, craftsfolk, anyone we're willing to vouch for. There isn't another town to send them to.

corin_house_offer.speaker: Corin Mosscup
corin_house_offer.text: I keep the inn for everyone, but I'd like a door that locks with my name on it. Same house as anyone else. Build it from the token, then list me on the management block when it's ready.

corin_house_accepted.speaker: Corin Mosscup
corin_house_accepted.text: Thanks. I'll keep the kettle on here until the house is yours to place.

corin_house_remind.speaker: Corin Mosscup
corin_house_remind.text: No rush. When the house is built, assign me on its shelf. I'll know it was mine.
